title: CLUB Y - 211info
text: YMCA OF MID-WILLAMETTE CLUB Y Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Club Y is a monthly program where children socialize and play with supervision. Activities have a focus and include organized activities like arts, and crafts, games, tournaments, homework, science, computers, and fun with friends. Three hours max visit per day. 3201 Pacific Boulevard SW Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Varies by service (children must have parent or guardian on site) Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 926-4488 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 926-4488 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Proof of income and recent tax return if applying for financial assistance. Proof of military status if applying for military discount. Photo ID is required when entering facility. AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, and Marion Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 5am-9pm, Friday 5:30am-7pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-1pm Services: Youth Centers Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - NON-SCHOOL DAY PROGRAM SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YMCA OF MID-WILLAMETTE
